context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual indicator of dirty cage environment, floats around Echo
context.usage_scenario: Appears when cage is dirty (3+ poop). 3-4 dust particles float randomly around Echo. Disappears when cage is cleaned.

animation.description: Spawns around Echo, drifts slowly in random directions (1-2px/second), persists while dirty state active. 3-4 particles visible at once.

visual_specification.details: Dust: 1x1px gray (#C2C3C7) single pixel. Spawn area: around Echo (x=60-68, y=55-65). Movement: slow random drift, 1-2px/second in random directions. Lifespan: persists during dirty state (not time-limited). 3-4 particles visible simultaneously. Disappears instantly when cage cleaned.

relationships.differences_from: feather_particle: gray vs orange, dirty vs preening, random drift vs horizontal. sparkle_particle: dirty vs clean, gray vs white.

explicit_negations: Dust does not form clouds or clusters
No upward or downward bias (truly random drift)
Particles do not grow or shrink
No smell lines or stink waves
Dust does not settle on surfaces
